title: Lafarge Plc Board To Meet Over 2020 Financial Statements
description: The board of directors of Lafarge Africa Plc, has informed the market community that it has scheduled Friday March 19, 2021 for its meeting to consider the audited financial statements for the period
html:
The board of directors of Lafarge Africa Plc, has informed the market community that it has scheduled Friday March 19, 2021 for its meeting to consider the audited financial statements for the period ended December 31, 2020.

According to a statement which was sent to the Nigerian Stock Exchange (NSE) and signed by Adewunmi Alode, General Counsel and Company Secretary, Lafarge Africa Plc, “Consequently, the Company has declared the closed period from Wednesday, 3rd March 2021 until the 2020 Audited Financial Statements is released on the floor of the Nigerian Stock Exchange, in line with the Company’s Insider Trading Policy and the Rules of the Nigerian Stock Exchange”.

The statement added that “Accordingly, no Director, employee, persons discharging managerial responsibility and Advisers of the Company and their connected persons may directly or indirectly deal in the shares of the Company in any manner during the Closed Period.
